// HACKTENDO // s-deck Expansion UI socket.on('unlock_dock_tool', data => { const dock = document.getElementById('dock'); const existing = document.getElementById(`btn-${data.type}`); if (existing) return; const btn = document.createElement('i'); btn.id = `btn-${data.type}`; if (data.type === "DARK") { btn.className = "fa-solid fa-skull dock-item"; btn.style.color = "#ff003c"; btn.title = "Dark Arts"; btn.onclick = () => OS.openExpansionWindow('dark-arts', '#ff003c'); } else { btn.className = "fa-solid fa-shield-halved dock-item"; btn.style.color = "cyan"; btn.title = "Light Arts"; btn.onclick = () => OS.openExpansionWindow('light-arts', 'cyan'); } dock.appendChild(btn); }); OS.openExpansionWindow = function(slug, color) { const id = `win-${slug}`; if(!document.getElementById(id)) { const w = document.createElement('div'); w.id = id; w.className = 'window'; w.style.cssText = `top:120px; left:300px; width:800px; height:500px; border-color:${color}; display:flex;`; w.innerHTML = `
${slug.toUpperCase()}_v1.0
`; document.getElementById('desktop').appendChild(w); OS.makeWindowsDraggable(); } else { document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'flex'; } };
